title: My ML model BTC prediction for next (2025-12-16 to 2025-12-19)
author: Spirited_Syllabub488

comments.author: AwesomeThyme777
comments.body: Curious as to what your process was for creating this model? Not asking you to give away your alpha, but how long did it take you? What libraries did you use? And if you don't mind, what type of model is it?

replies.author: Spirited_Syllabub488
replies.body:
1. I learned how to utilize coding in trading. Came across data analysis and mining and then I am into ML. I just know what and how to do and the rest is being coded..
2. It took me 2 years to finally land to a profitable model. This model took me around 7 months to build from understanding the concept of this model and coding it and then backtesting then frontesting and many other things. Took me 7 months to build and I am currently trading it for 8 months now.
3. Not specific libraries but the necessary ones one need to use the ML models I coded in it.
4. It is a pure machine learning model that learns and adapts to new market data. It uses its learning on past price and predicts next 4 days of movement. 

Also I am looking to sell this profitable model.
